title: Lab: Repair a Multi-Format Public Alert Player
summary: Lab: Repair a Multi-Format Public Alert Player retrieves prior skills in an original keyboard semantics and transcript incident in a public alert player scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply keyboard focus, aria use, accessible media equivalents in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real keyboard semantics and transcript incident in a public alert player artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Keyboard semantics and transcript incident in a public alert player case 1: remove focus outlines after mouse use because keyboard users can remember position.
Keyboard semantics and transcript incident in a public alert player case 1: keep DOM and visual order aligned, use native controls, preserve visible focus, and test every task without a pointer.
Keyboard semantics and transcript incident in a public alert player case 1: add tabindex zero to every heading and paragraph so all content becomes interactive.
